reference: BUT HERMON WAS NOT IN THE MOOD TO SHARE A JOYOUS REVEL AND HE FRANKLY SAID SO ALTHOUGH IMMEDIATELY AFTER HIS RETURN HE HAD ACCEPTED THE INVITATION TO THE FESTIVAL WHICH THE WHOLE FELLOWSHIP OF ARTISTS WOULD GIVE THE FOLLOWING DAY IN HONOUR OF THE SEVENTIETH BIRTHDAY OF THE OLD SCULPTOR EUPHRANOR
text: But Hermann was not in the mood to share a joyous revel, and he frankly said so. Although immediately after his return he had accepted the invitation to the festival, which the whole fellowship of artists would give the following day in honor of the seventieth birthday of the old sculptor Euphrenner.
